title: bromus lloydianus
intro: Bromus lloydianus, also known as Lloyd's brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Bromus lloydianus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
